use_cases: Display team member profiles on company about pages
Show user avatars in comments, reviews, or forum threads
Render user profile pictures in navigation headers or dashboards
Display contact avatars in messaging or collaboration apps
Show speaker or presenter photos in event/conference contexts
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with graceful fallbacks. Features circular avatars with image support and muted background fallbacks for missing photos. Commonly used in team sections, user profiles, comments, and navigation elements across SaaS, e-commerce, and collaboration platforms.
